title: MetricTimeseriesQuery
description: Request body for querying timeseries metric data

data.description: The query data object containing type and attributes

type.description: The type identifier for the query request

attributes.description: The query attributes including formulas, queries, and time range

from.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the start of the query time range

to.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the end of the query time range

interval.description: The granularity (in milliseconds) for returned data points

queries.description: List of metric queries to evaluate

formulas.description: List of formula expressions combining the defined queries
